framework.name: Adyen Agent-vs-Automation Fraud Distinction
framework.description: Adyen explicitly calls out the need for fraud systems that can distinguish legitimate AI agents from malicious automation — suggesting they're thinking about this at the risk infrastructure layer but haven't shipped anything specific yet.
framework.raw_quote: Agent-led transactions require clear authorization boundaries, fraud systems that distinguish legitimate agents from malicious automation, and defined liability frameworks.

source.title: Agentic commerce and control: Getting the balance right - Adyen
